briefdescription.para: This Function Starts the VDMA (Video Direct Memory Access) engine for the given Video Processing Subsystem instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function initiates both the write and read channels of the VDMA associated with the specified XVprocSs instance. It checks if the VDMA pointer is valid before starting the DMA operations.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XVprocSs instance containing the VDMA configuration.

briefdescription.para: This Function Stops the VDMA (Video Direct Memory Access) engine for the given Video Processing Subsystem instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function stops both the write and read channels of the VDMA associated with the specified XVprocSs instance. It checks if the VDMA pointer is valid before starting the DMA operations.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XVprocSs instance containing the VDMA configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function resets Read and Write channels.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the VPSS instance

memberdef.argsstring: (XVprocSs *XVprocSsPtr, UINTPTR WrBaseAddress, XVidC_VideoWindow *window, u32 FrameWidth, u32 FrameHeight, u32 PixelWidthInBits)
memberdef.name: XVprocSs_VdmaWriteSetup

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the write channel.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the VPSS instance.
is the address in DDR where frame buffers are located
is pointer to sub-frame window
is the active width of the stream to be written
is the active height of the stream to be written
is Bits Per Pixel required for the stream

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the setup is successful, XST_FAILURE otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVprocSs *XVprocSsPtr, UINTPTR RdBaseAddress, XVidC_VideoWindow *window, u32 FrameWidth, u32 FrameHeight, u32 PixelWidthInBits)
memberdef.name: XVprocSs_VdmaReadSetup

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the read channel.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the VPSS instance.
is the address in DDR where frame buffers are located
is pointer to sub-frame window
is the active width of the stream to be read
is the active height of the stream to be read
is Bits Per Pixel required for the stream

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the setup is successful, XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function starts the transfer on Read/Write channels.

detaileddescription.para: Both channels must have been configured before this call is made

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the VPSS instance.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the setup is successful, XST_FAILURE otherwise.
Currently the return value is ignored at subsystem level.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the VDMA RD/WR channel for down scale mode.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the VPSS instance.
defines VDMA channel (RD/WR or RD+WR) to update

briefdescription.para: This function configures the VDMA RD/WR channel for UP scale (or 1:1) mode.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the VPSS instance.
defines VDMA channel (RD/WR or RD+WR) to update

briefdescription.para: XVprocSs_VdmaDbgReportStatus - Used for reporting the status of the VDMA IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function prints debug information about the current status of the VDMA (Video Direct Memory Access) associated with the given XVprocSs instance. It reports both the read and write channel settings, including height, width, and stride, with values interpreted according to the specified pixel width in bits. The function also clears DMA channel errors and dumps relevant register values for both channels.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XVprocSs instance containing the VDMA pointer.
The width of a pixel in bits, used to calculate bytes per pixel and interpret register values.
